{{Infobox group
| name = Enosh Grandmasters
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Enosh]] [[Grandmasters]] are a powerful group of leaders and combatants within the city of [[Enosh]]. They serve as a significant portion of the [[Enosh]] fighting force and operate out of a central palace, which contains specialized rooms for their activities and a dedicated war council chamber. This council room features a large stone table and banners representing the various [[Territories]] that each Grandmaster manages through [[Traveling]]. Known members include [[Naraka]], an elderly woman and mist-binder who wears distinctive red lenses; [[Avernus]], a silver-haired woman; and [[Endross]], a man associated with a green banner. The [[Grandmasters]] hold authority over the [[Enosh Travelers]] and can issue prohibitions. They are motivated by a belief that [[Damasca]] is a tyrannical power responsible for destroying the world. In times of conflict, they are capable of mobilizing massive military efforts, including the potential use of powerful weapons from the Ragnarus Vaults.}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Enosh Grandmasters]] call [[Ragnarus the Crimson Vault]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10">''House of Blades'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Enosh Grandmasters]] had conflicting feelings about [[Alin]]'s return: relief, fury, and delight.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c23">''House of Blades'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Indirial]] intends to show the [[Enosh Grandmasters]] what a soldier of the [[Dragon Army]] can do.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Enosh Grandmasters]] control [[Naraka waypoints]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Enosh Grandmasters]] hold a war council in a specially designed room.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Enosh Grandmasters]] believed the bloodline of [[Elysia]] continued in a village.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
